ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned] All right, I can work with this trade request, but terms must remain fair. Keep it honest and we can close this deal quickly in my talkative style.<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>Note: Balanced context relevance; slightly less consistent persona due to the urgency of response, but naturalness is high.
[baseline_no_context] Ah, my dear traveler! While the urgency of your quest does not escape me, fair trade is at the heart of our dealings here.<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Note

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as an Old Merchant concerned with fairness and trade, sounds natural in conversation style, but could improve by directly addressing the player's urgency.
